entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange officially launched on March 15, 2018 and currently provided through Marshall Islands-addressed GBM Global Inc.
entity.notes: BitMart's official history gives an exact launch date of March 15, 2018. The origin field follows the current official user agreement, which identifies GBM Global Inc. with a Marshall Islands registration number and address. Cayman Islands governing law is documented separately and is not treated as the entity origin.

events.title: BitMart officially launched
events.description: BitMart officially launched its cryptocurrency trading platform on March 15, 2018.
events.notes: The exact launch date is stated in BitMart's official operating history.

evidence.title: BitMart official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current BitMart identity and active exchange service.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange reference for BitMart
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the BitMart identity.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for BitMart
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the BitMart exchange identity.

evidence.title: BitMart User Agreement
evidence.notes: Official agreement identifies GBM Global Inc. as BitMart, provides registration number 134925, and gives a Marshall Islands address.

evidence.title: BitMart Announces Galaxy Program
evidence.notes: Official BitMart article states that the exchange officially launched on March 15, 2018.
